chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-5254 of 2016 ARY Communication Ltd. Versus Muhammad Tahir & another Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of Misc. No.25811/16 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 04.10.2024 Mr. Abid S. Zuberi along with Mr. Mushtaq Ahmed for petitioner. Mr. Kashif Hanif for respondents. -.-.- On instructions, Mr. Abid Zuberi, learned counsel appearing for petitioner, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Chief Justice Judge
